ogTitle: Derriwong vs Deua River Valley: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Derriwong and Deua River Valley.
heading: Derriwong vs Deua River Valley — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Derriwong, New South Wales and Deua River Valley, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Deua River Valley has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Derriwong (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Derriwong or Deua River Valley safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Derriwong has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Deua River Valley scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Derriwong scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Deua River Valley scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Derriwong or Deua River Valley?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Deua River Valley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
